# AGENT-CONTEXT.md — compact agent boot digest (hotam-spec-self)

This file is the compact entry point for an agent session — target < 15KB. It is a live-state pulse, a top-action shortlist, and an id+flag-only constitution index, NOT a substitute for the full reference docs. Full claims/WHY/assumptions, tension detail, and rejection history remain in the other docs/gen/*.md files below — those are reference-only, load them on demand, not at every boot.

- context: UNMEASURED — measuring working-context requires host cooperation the framework will not touch (R-work-within-launch-dir); it measures only if the local stdin payload honestly carries ctx_pct — R-unmeasured-cipher-names-host-boundary

## Details on demand

- One requirement's full claim + WHY + assumptions: `hotam req show <id> --domain domains/hotam-spec-self`.
- Full requirement roster: `domains/hotam-spec-self/docs/gen/REQUIREMENTS.md`.
- Tension clusters: `domains/hotam-spec-self/docs/gen/TENSIONS.md`.
- Rejection history: `domains/hotam-spec-self/docs/gen/HISTORY.md`.
- Enforcement gap detail: `domains/hotam-spec-self/docs/gen/UNENFORCED.md`.
- Framework-internal atoms: `domains/hotam-spec-self/docs/gen/FRAMEWORK-INVARIANTS.md`.
- Review-freshness detail (which ids, how overdue): `hotam due --domain domains/hotam-spec-self`.
